query: color banding posterized gradient sky digital artifact
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — color banding in skies, posterization artifacts

response.objective_caption: A broad horizontal bank of dense clouds stretches across the upper and middle portions of the frame, with illuminated edges in shades of orange and gold. The central cloud masses are dark and heavily shadowed. Gaps between the formations reveal sections of saturated blue sky, transitioning to lighter blue with scattered streaks of thin clouds toward the bottom of the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A massive bank of dense clouds stretches across the sky, rendered in aggressively saturated orange and deep blue tones that form a clashing, disharmonious palette. The dark, heavy cloud bodies are edged with fiery amber light while pockets of intense cobalt sky peek through the gaps. The scene evokes atmospheric distress through the looming arrangement of shadowed masses and the unsettling intensity of the colors, creating an oppressive and uneasy mood. Wispy clouds in the lower portion continue the stark tonal contrasts across the frame.
